title: Ubiquiti WM-W, WiFiMan Wizard spectrum analyzer
description: WiFiMan Wizard is a portable spectral analyzer designed for the WiFiMan iOS and Android mobile application with which it communicates wirelessly via Bluetooth. Together with a Lidar-equipped smartphone, it is able to project the WiFi scan on a map created by the Lidar and your movement/field walk around the building. The spectrum analyzer works in the license-free bands 2.4 - 2.5 GHz and 5.15 - 5.85 GHz with a sensitivity of up to -96 dBm. The device itself has an integrated battery with a… 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz unlicensed band scanning 240 minutes continuous scanning battery life BLE smartphone pairing with USB-C charging port Support iPhone Mag-safe with Mag-safe cover Works with WiFiman mobile app since version 0.18.0 for iOS and 1.15.0 for Android Spectral analyzer, scheduler and frequency mapping inside the building using Lidar technology GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
